\tzpentry{ID3643}{Transfer Operator}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID3643 introduces Transfer Operator as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} \mathcal{T}_{\text{QG}} = \Topos\left[\begin{aligned} &\cat{Obj}: \{\mathcal{M}_{\text{quantum}}, \mathcal{M}_{\text{gravity}}, \mathcal{M}_{\text{info}}, \mathcal{M}_{\text{entangle}}\} \\ &\cat{Mor}: \{\mathcal{F}_{\text{acc}}: \mathcal{M}_{\text{quantum}} \rightarrow \mathcal{M}_{\text{gravity}}, \\ &\qquad\quad \mathcal{R}_{\text{decode}}: \mathcal{M}_{\text{gravity}} \rightarrow \mathcal{M}_{\text{quantum}}, \\ &\qquad\quad \mathcal{E}_{\text{flow}}: \mathcal{M}_{\text{info}} \rightarrow \mathcal{M}_{\text{entangle}}\} \\ &\cat{Sheaf}: \Omega^{\bullet}(\mathcal{M}) \rightarrow \cat{Set} \end{aligned}\right] \end{equation}
